prompt.description: Text description guiding content, style, and motion of the video.

model.description: Model identifier. Use VEO3_1 for standard or VEO3_1FAST for fast generation.

duration.description: Video length in seconds. Only 4, 6, or 8 are valid.

width.description: Video width in pixels. Must match one of the supported dimension pairs.

height.description: Video height in pixels. Must match one of the supported dimension pairs.

imageId.description: Start frame image ID for image-to-video generation. Must be an uploaded or previously generated asset.

imageType.description: Source type of the start frame image. Set to UPLOADED or GENERATED.

endFrameImage.description: End frame for start-and-end-frame generation. Requires imageId and imageType to also be set.

isPublic.description: Whether the generated video is public or private.

rules: VIDEO model — duration is ONLY 4, 6, or 8 seconds. No other values.
DO NOT set style — not available for video models.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — not available for this model.
DO NOT set prompt_enhance — not available for this model.
DO NOT set motion_has_audio — not available for this model.
DO NOT set guidances.* — this model uses flat imageId/imageType instead.
Only 2 aspect ratios: 16:9 and 9:16. No 1:1 or other ratios.
2 resolutions × 2 aspect ratios = 4 valid dimension combos.
Uploaded images will be CROPPED to fit the output dimensions.
Start frame: use imageId + imageType (flat params, NOT nested in guidances).
endFrameImage: use { id, type } object. REQUIRES imageId to also be set.
No image_reference or video_reference — only start/end frame modes.
Model variant VEO3_1FAST = faster generation at same quality.
When width/height not specified, resolution + aspect ratio determine dimensions.
Dimensions outside the 4 valid combos will be REJECTED by the API.
